name: SANSKRITI SHAKYA
summary: Second-year Computer Science undergraduate seeking a Software Engineering or AI/ML internship to gain hands-on, large-scale engineering experience. Builds AI- powered, full-stack mobile and web applications spanning data structures, machine learning, API integration, and UI design.
projects: StudyMate AI
Flutter, Gemini API, Firebase
Built an AI-powered study companion offering note-taking, quizzes, flashcards,
mind maps, PDF tools, streaks, and badges.
Integrated Gemini-powered assistance for PDF summarization, content
insights, automated notes, and reminders/timetables, cutting students' study-
prep time by ~30% by consolidating tools into a single workspace.
DeepScholar AI
Flutter, Gemini API
Extended StudyMate AI into a research-focused tool with an assistant mode
that builds personalized schedules/planners and summarizes research material
on demand.
Task Tracker (To-Do App)
HTML, CSS, JavaScript
First full-stack web project; built a task list manager for creating, tracking, and
completing to-dos, establishing core front-end fundamentals.
ML Prediction Models
Python, Pandas, scikit-learn
Built and trained basic supervised-learning prediction models to learn the end-
to-end ML workflow, from data cleaning to evaluation.
Data Visualization Projects
Python, Pandas, Matplotlib
Practiced the full data pipeline — preprocessing, exploratory analysis, and
chart-driven storytelling — to derive and present actionable insights.
ACTIVITIES & LEADERSHIP
Hackathon Finalist, KAIROTIC (KAIROS Tech Week 2026): Reached the final
round with Team YAKS in a university-level hackathon organized by ACM-W,
Manipal Institute of Technology.
Inter-College Athletics — 2 Bronze Medals: Won bronze in Javelin Throw and
Discus Throw at an inter-college sports tournament.
Presentation & Leadership: Regularly takes the lead role in group projects,
structuring and presenting work in front of class.
TDA Summer Bootcamp, The Data Alchemists Club, MIT Manipal: Completed
an intensive program covering Agentic AI, DSA, AI/ML, Data Visualization, and
Web Development.
Member, IECSE Technical Club, MIT Manipal: Active participant in technical
workshops and events.
Volunteer, AIESEC (6 months): Communicated and coordinated with cross-
country exchange participants, guiding them through their exchange journey.
Competitive Programming: Active on LeetCode; participated in a coding
contest.
Flexible and enthusiastic learner with a positive, problem-solving mindset — driven to
deliver strong results, equally in engineering and management roles.
certifications: Data Analysis with Pandas & Python — Packt,
Fundamentals of Data Visualization — The Data
